ComponentType: Brushed DC Motor Driver IC (H-Bridge with PWM Control)
Description: The DRV8870 is an integrated H-bridge motor driver designed to bidirectionally control a single brushed DC motor, one winding of a stepper motor, or other inductive loads. It features a PWM control interface for speed regulation, integrated current sensing and regulation, and comprehensive protection (undervoltage, overcurrent, thermal shutdown). Operating from 6.5V to 45V, it can deliver up to 3.6A peak output current.

KeyParameters.Control Interface: Two logic inputs (IN1, IN2) for direction/PWM
KeyParameters.Current Regulation: Adjustable via VREF pin (0.3 V to 5 V) and external sense resistor
KeyParameters.Protection Features: Undervoltage Lockout (UVLO), Overcurrent Protection (OCP), Thermal Shutdown (TSD)
KeyParameters.Low-Power Mode: Sleep mode activated when both logic inputs are low
